structure: Array of objects, each with 4 top-level keys: properties(supertype), supertype_locations, properties(cluster), cluster_locations. One object per supertype-cluster pair. Denormalised: each row carries both supertype and cluster level data.

field_mappings.notes: CCN accession CS20230722_SUPT_0197. Stable ID for the supertype node.
WMB:CS20230722_SUPT_0197 — CURIE form of accession, use as node_id.
Human-readable supertype name: "0197 RHP-COA Ndnf Gaba_5".
Same as label but in a list. Redundant with label; preserve as comment if different.
Label + accession combined string. Display convenience; redundant.
Full IRI for the supertype. Derivable from curie; preserve as comment.
Short label slug with underscores replacing spaces/hyphens. Internal display ID.
Quoted short label. Same as sl. Internal display.
Same value as short_form for supertypes. Accession in list form.
URLs to atlas h5ad and brain-map viewer. Useful as metadata_url or see_also links.
Always "Cell_cluster". Internal VFB facet.
Comma-separated marker genes for this supertype: "Scrg1,Edaradd". Global (unscoped) markers.
Markers distinctive within the parent subclass: "Scrg1,Ccbe1". Scoped markers — high value for mapping.
Array of {cell_count, loc_id (MBA CURIE), loc_name}. Pre-resolved MBA terms. Map loc_id→id, loc_name→label+name_in_source.
CCN accession CS20230722_CLUS_0703. Stable ID for the cluster node.
WMB:CS20230722_CLUS_0703 — CURIE form of accession, use as node_id.
Human-readable cluster name: "0703 RHP-COA Ndnf Gaba_5".
Same as label but in a list. Redundant.
Label + accession combined. Display convenience.
Full IRI. Derivable from curie; preserve as comment.
Short label slug. Internal display.
Quoted short label. Internal display.
Same value as short_form for clusters.
URLs to atlas viewer. Useful as metadata_url.
Always "Cell_cluster". Internal VFB facet.
Comma-separated marker genes: "Ibsp,Lama1,Vwc2l". Global (unscoped) markers.
Markers distinctive within the parent subclass: "Gpc4,Zim1". Scoped markers — highest value for mapping.
Transcription factor markers: "Sp8,Maf,Sox13,Bcl11b,Zim1,Sox5". Subset of markers by gene class.
MERFISH panel markers: "Htr3a,Edaradd,Ccbe1,Oprd1,Grik3". Spatial validation markers.
Primary NT phenotype: "GABA". Map to NeurotransmitterType.
Same as nt_type_label here ("GABA"). May differ for dual-NT types.
CCN accession for the NT type: CS20230722_NEUR_GABA.
Genes supporting NT call: [Slc32a1, Gad1, Gad2]. Evidence for the NT assignment.
Gene expression with scores: "Gad2:10.85,Gad1:10.2,Slc32a1:7.99". Quantitative NT evidence.
Same as neurotransmitter_rationale. Redundant — use for cross-check.
Neuropeptide markers with expression scores: "Cck:8.7,Pnoc:6.5,Npy:4.9". Parse gene symbols for neuropeptides list.
Broad grouping: "Subpallium-GABA". Not a schema field but biologically informative.
Array of {cell_count, loc_id (MBA CURIE), loc_name}. Pre-resolved MBA terms. Authoritative location source.
DEPRECATED old CCF mapping. Skip per instructions.
DEPRECATED old CCF mapping. Skip per instructions.
Cross-taxonomy ID in CTX taxonomy: 26.0. Cross-reference for isocortex taxonomy.
Cross-taxonomy label: "26_Ndnf HPF_2". Cross-reference label.
Cross-taxonomy supertype ID in CTX: 9.0.
Cross-taxonomy supertype label: "Ndnf HPF".
Cross-taxonomy subclass ID in CTX: 4.0.
Cross-taxonomy subclass label: "Sncg".
Cross-taxonomy neighborhood ID: 1.0.
Cross-taxonomy neighborhood label: "CGE".
Sum of cell_count across supertype_locations entries. Spatially resolved; more accurate than dataset-version size fields.
Sum of cell_count across cluster_locations entries. Spatially resolved; more accurate than dataset-version size fields.
Cell count in CTX taxonomy. Superseded by location cell_count sums. Skip.
Cell count in v2 dataset. Superseded by location cell_count sums. Skip.
Cell count in v3 dataset. Superseded by location cell_count sums. Skip.
Male fraction: 0.42. Sex composition.
Female fraction: 0.58. Sex composition.
Light phase fraction: 0.88. Circadian sampling bias metric.
Dark phase fraction: 0.12. Circadian sampling bias metric.

schema_candidates.rationale: Sex fractions indicate whether a cluster has strong sex bias, which is biologically meaningful for sex-specific cell types (e.g. hormone-responsive neurons).

marker_aggregation.strategy: aggregate all; note source per gene as YAML comment. Scoped (within_subclass) markers are highest priority for mapping. TF markers get separate flag. MERFISH markers go to merfish_markers field.

structure_notes: Denormalised: each JSON object contains both supertype-level and cluster-level data for one cluster. The supertype is the parent of the cluster (many clusters share one supertype). Two taxonomy levels per row: SUPERTYPE and CLUSTER. Higher levels (SUBCLASS, CLASS) are not present in this file but are referenced indirectly via CTX_subclass_label and neighborhood. Location data is in separate top-level arrays (supertype_locations, cluster_locations) with pre-resolved MBA CURIEs — these are the authoritative location source.
